notes: WoW 2.4.3 game client (Final Burning Crusade patch). 32-bit PE, MSVC compiled. ~27,706 functions, 510 RTTI entries. Phase 1: 762 Lua API functions. Phase 2: 219 networking functions (415 opcodes, mangos-tbc cross-reference). Phase 3: ~100 vtable/ctor/frame-factory functions. Phase 4: 181 WowClientDB<T>::Load DBC loader instantiations. Phase 5: 7 WowClientDB<T>::Unload bodies. Phase 6: 55 source path sweep (WowSvcsClientServices, RealmList, GlueMgr, CDataStore, PatchFiles, UIMacros, BlizzardCore IO layer).
